h1.visual_description: Not explicitly present on this page, but inferred as a top-level section title (e.g., '7. EXPERIMENT TITLE') likely in a similar bold, uppercase, sans-serif style.

h2.visual_description: Bold, uppercase, sans-serif font, prefixed with a hierarchical section number (e.g., 7.2.).
h2.example_text: 7.2. DETERMINATION OF THE COEFFICIENT OF DISCHARGE

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered mathematical expression with a right-aligned number in parentheses
Italicized single characters or characters with subscripts within paragraphs

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX (use $$ for block equations and $ for inline variables)
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Direct textual reference to equation numbers, e.g., 'Equation (8)' or 'Equations (10)'

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-right footer containing the experiment title and page number (e.g., 'EXPERIMENT #6: ORIFICE AND FREE JET FLOW 53').
